code_usability.detail: No executable code generated; Mode A writing skill

functional_suitability.note: Description accurate but could more clearly differentiate from impact-factor lookup tools

reliability.note: Mismatch warning exists but not gated — high-IF journal still appears in list despite weak evidence

agent_usability.note: Feedback design: no check-in before producing the full tiered table

maintainability.note: Testability limited without canonical journal database

agent_specific.note: Description precise; one gap: composability assumes standalone use only

key_strengths: Three-tier recommendation structure (ambition/good fit/safe) sets realistic expectations while showing range
Explicit mismatch warning for evidence-weak papers targeting high-IF journals is a rare and valuable feature
IF data currency caveat is correctly framed as user-verification responsibility
Scoring framework (topic overlap/method acceptance/impact realism/practical fit) provides transparent rationale

recommendations.title: High-IF journal recommended despite evidence-strength mismatch warning
recommendations.problem: In the edge case test, the skill correctly warned about evidence-level mismatch but still included a top-tier journal in the recommendation table without prominently flagging it as unlikely.
recommendations.root_cause: Tier 1 recommendations are generated before the mismatch warning is fully applied; the warning and the recommendation list are not linked.
recommendations.fix: Add a gating rule: if evidence strength is rated as weak (single-center, n<100, retrospective pilot), automatically exclude journals above IF 5 from Tier 1 recommendation unless the user explicitly requests them.

recommendations.title: Journal scope descriptions based on training knowledge without recency caveat per journal
recommendations.problem: While a general IF-currency caveat is present, individual journal scope descriptions may be outdated (e.g., editorial policy changes).
recommendations.root_cause: Scope knowledge is from training cutoff without per-journal recency flag.
recommendations.fix: Add a per-recommendation note: 'Scope description based on training knowledge as of [cutoff]. Verify current aims and scope at the journal website before submission.'

recommendations.title: Agent Usability feedback design underspecified for multi-journal output
recommendations.problem: When producing a full tiered table, the skill does not specify a confirmation step before the full recommendation is finalized.
recommendations.root_cause: Output is delivered in one pass without an optional check-in.
recommendations.fix: Add an optional single-question check-in after initial topic analysis: 'Based on your study topic and design, I plan to cover [Field X]. Correct?' before generating the full tiered table.
